checks.name: credential_defense_help
checks.output_excerpt:
usage: credential-defense [-h]
                          {init,detect-browsers,watchdog-status,watchdog-daemon,import-exports,list-records,session,run-actions,support-server}
                          ...

Credential Defense - local-first breach response workflow

positional arguments:
  {init,detect-browsers,watchdog-status,watchdog-daemon,import-exports,list-records,session,run-actions,support-server}
    init                Initialize config files and encrypted vault
    detect-browsers     Detect installed browser profile directories
    watchdog-status     Write and print runtime OS/watchdog status
    watchdog-daemon     Run watchdog heartbeat loop for Linux/Windows runtime
                        detection
    import-exports      Import browser CSV exports into encrypted vault
    list-records        List vault records (without printing passwords)
    session             Run guided top-to-bottom triage session
    run-actions         Run queued rotate/delete actions with confirmations
    support-server      Run local support hub (AI chat hotline +
                        feature/problem ticket queue)

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

checks.name: watchdog_help
checks.output_excerpt:
usage: watchdog.py [-h] {baseline,scan,watch} ...

Realyn Android watchdog

positional arguments:
  {baseline,scan,watch}
    baseline            collect and save baseline snapshot
    scan                scan and compare to baseline
    watch               run scan in a loop

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
